staticCommands.name: disk
staticCommands.description: Moves a project on disk from one physical location to another. See https://github.com/antoinne85/DotNetMove for more details and example usages.

options.description: The path on disk that the project should be moved to.
The path to the folder or .csproj file for a project.
Toggles solution search, which will locate solution files referencing the moved project and update them.
The path to the solution file that should be updated as part of the move.

staticCommands.name: solution
staticCommands.description: Moves a project into a solution folder. See https://github.com/antoinne85/DotNetMove for more details and example usages.

options.description: The solution folder in which to place the project.
The name of the project to move.
Toggles solution search, which will locate solution files referencing the moved project and update them.
The path to the solution file that should be updated as part of the move.
